atlas-hub.name: Atlas Hub
atlas-hub.desc: The central smart city of Atlas Valley. Solar panels cover every rooftop. Drones deliver packages overhead. This is where your journey begins.

npcs.name: panthera_leo
dialog: Welcome to Atlas Valley, traveler. I am panthera_leo, co-founder of this ecosystem.
The world has changed. Cities run on clean energy. AI manages the grid. But wild creatures still roam.
These are called AEONS — Atlas Energy Origin Nexus creatures. Born from our technology.
Take this starter AEON. Your journey as an AEONist begins now.
Find all 20 AEONS, challenge the 5 Atlas Gym Leaders, and face the Atlas Council.

npcs.name: elf_wizard
dialog: Ah, a new AEONist! I am elf_wizard, Atlas Valley's chief AEON researcher.
I've catalogued every AEON species in the AAO database.
The AEON Codex is stored in the Supabase cloud — find creatures to fill it.
Pro tip: AEONS near wind turbines tend to be Electric type. Near water purifiers? Water type.
Come back when your Codex has 10+ entries — I have something special for you.

npcs.name: Atlas Barber Scout
dialog: Hey! Atlas Barber just opened in the Barber District east of here!
Best cuts in the whole valley. Drop-in welcome, or book ahead.
They say the barbers there can channel AEON energy into their grooming techniques...

npcs.name: Rookie AEONist
dialog: I just got my first AEON! Battle me!

battle.name: Rookie AEONist
battle.win_dialog: Whoa! You're strong! Here, take some credits.
battle.lose_dialog: Yes! I won my first battle!

gym.name: Gyro
gym.intro: I am Gyro, master of electric AEONS! In Atlas Hub, electricity is life. Let me show you its power!

barber-district.name: Barber District
barber-district.desc: A stylish urban quarter where Atlas Barber's flagship salon stands. Electric scooters line the streets. Barber bots roam freely.

npcs.name: The Barber Boss
dialog: Only those with sharp AEONS can sit in my chair. Battle me first!

battle.name: The Barber Boss
battle.win_dialog: Impeccable! Free haircut for life — and a bonus item.
battle.lose_dialog: Ha! You're not ready for Atlas Barber yet.

npcs.name: Atlas Barber Receptionist
dialog: Welcome to Atlas Barber — where style meets the future.
Drop in anytime or book a session. Our barbers are certified AEON tamers too.
Visit atlas-barber.github.io to book your appointment!

solar-fields.name: Solar Fields
solar-fields.desc: Endless solar panel arrays stretch to the horizon. Electric AEONS thrive here, basking in photon energy.

npcs.name: Solar Tech Engineer
dialog: These fields power 40% of Atlas Valley! And breed the strongest Electric AEONs.

route-1.name: Eco Route 1
route-1.desc: A smart highway lined with electric vehicle charging points and wild AEON habitats.

npcs.name: EV Driver
dialog: My electric car is powered by Atlas Valley's grid! So are my AEONs!

nova-city.name: Nova City
nova-city.desc: Atlas Valley's second great metropolis. Wind turbines crown every skyscraper. Home to the Aero Gym.

npcs.name: Aero
dialog: I am Aero, Nova City's Gym Leader. My AEONS ride the wind between the turbines.
Only those who have earned the Volt Badge may challenge me.
Ready to take flight?

npcs.name: Tech Merchant
dialog: Best tech items in Nova City, right here!

gym.intro: The wind is mine to command! Prove your worth against the sky!

wind-ridge.name: Wind Ridge
wind-ridge.desc: A ridge crowned with hundreds of wind turbines. Flying AEONS swarm around the massive blades.

hydro-coast.name: Hydro Coast
hydro-coast.desc: Atlas Valley's coastline. Wave energy converters line the shores. Water AEONS surface near the hydrogen plants.

deep-server.name: Deep Server
deep-server.desc: Atlas Valley's underground data center city. Ghost AEONS haunt the server racks. The air hums with electricity.

npcs.name: Crypt
dialog: You have ventured into the Deep Server... few make it this far.
I am Crypt, master of Ghost AEONS. Digital phantoms answer to me.
Your data will be corrupted by the time I'm done with you.

gym.intro: In the Deep Server, your data belongs to me...

atlas-council.name: Atlas Council Chamber
atlas-council.desc: The ultimate challenge. The Atlas Council awaits at the peak of Atlas Valley's tallest arcology. Defeat all 5 members to become the Atlas Champion.

npcs.name: PANTHERA_LEO
dialog: You've made it. The Atlas Council has fallen before you.
I am panthera_leo — not just mentor, but Champion of Atlas Valley.
My AEONS were forged in the fires of this ecosystem. They are the best.
This is the ultimate test. Only the strongest AEONist can claim the Atlas Crown.
Let the final battle begin!
